title: Lab 48: SSH Key Authentication And SCP
description: Configure key-based SSH access and securely copy a file to the second system.

tasks.title: Create user bridge48 on both clientvm and servervm
tasks.prompt: Create user bridge48 on both clientvm and servervm. Set the password on both systems to cinder9.

tasks.title: generate an ED25519 SSH key pair with no passphrase
tasks.prompt: As user bridge48 on clientvm, generate an ED25519 SSH key pair with no passphrase.

tasks.title: Configure passwordless SSH access for bridge48 from
tasks.prompt: Configure passwordless SSH access for bridge48 from clientvm to servervm using the public key.

tasks.title: Using scp over SSH, copy /home/bridge48/payload.txt
tasks.prompt: Using scp over SSH, copy /home/bridge48/payload.txt from clientvm to /home/bridge48/inbox/ on servervm.

hints: Use ssh-keygen, ssh-copy-id, and scp as the target user.
